component.name: LinuxPods
component.summary: AirPods control and battery monitor for Linux

description.p: LinuxPods is a native Linux application that unlocks Apple AirPods features on non-Apple devices. It communicates with AirPods via the reverse-engineered Apple Accessory Protocol (AAP) over Bluetooth L2CAP.

ul.li: Battery monitoring for left earbud, right earbud, and charging case
Noise control: Active Noise Cancellation, Transparency, Adaptive, Off
Ear detection with automatic media pause/play
Native KDE Plasma 6 system tray integration
D-Bus API for scripting and automation

description.p: Architecture split: headless daemon with D-Bus API and native KDE Plasma 6 system tray plasmoid.
